languages.text: "Да, и я повелеваю тебе признать мою победу в дебатах".
"I do, and I command you to acknowledge my victory in this debate."
languages.original_text: "Да, и я повелеваю тебе признать мою победу в дебатах".

traits.locale_text: "I do, and I command you to acknowledge my victory in this debate."
"I do, and I command you to acknowledge my victory in this debate."
"I do, and I command you to acknowledge my victory in this debate."

languages.text: «Sí, y le ordeno reconocer mi victoria en este debate».
languages.original_text: "I do, and I command you to acknowledge my victory in this debate."

traits.locale_text: «Sí, y le ordeno reconocer mi victoria en este debate».

languages.text: “没错，而且我命令你承认在这场辩论中我赢了。”
languages.original_text: "I do, and I command you to acknowledge my victory in this debate."

traits.locale_text: “没错，而且我命令你承认在这场辩论中我赢了。”

languages.text: « Tout à fait, et je vous ordonne de reconnaître ma victoire dans ce débat. »
languages.original_text: "I do, and I command you to acknowledge my victory in this debate."

traits.locale_text: « Tout à fait, et je vous ordonne de reconnaître ma victoire dans ce débat. »

languages.text: "Ja, und ich befehle Euch, meinen Sieg in dieser Debatte zu bestätigen."
languages.original_text: "I do, and I command you to acknowledge my victory in this debate."

traits.locale_text: "Ja, und ich befehle Euch, meinen Sieg in dieser Debatte zu bestätigen."

languages.text: 「そして、この討論における私の勝利を認めるよう命じる」。
languages.original_text: "I do, and I command you to acknowledge my victory in this debate."

languages.text: "Evet. Bu tartışmada zaferimi kabul etmeni emrediyorum."
languages.original_text: "I do, and I command you to acknowledge my victory in this debate."

traits.locale_text: "Evet. Bu tartışmada zaferimi kabul etmeni emrediyorum."
